description: CompositionWhite round neck t-shirt made of 100% cotton, with short sleeves, ribbed collar, and bold graphic and flock print on chestFittingRegularWash care Machine wash with warm water of 40 degrees Wash inside out with like colours Do not bleach Dry in shade Do not iron on print Bear that modest smile while you flaunt to the world your perfect side in style with this Mr. Perfect t-shirt from mr. men.
